name: dotnet-semantic-tools
description: Use Roslyn MCP tools for C#/.NET find usages, find references, go to definition, implementations, diagnostics, compile errors, test impact, rename, and refactor planning.

interface.shortDescription: Roslyn tools for C#/.NET usages, references, diagnostics, tests, and refactors.
interface.longDescription: Adds local-first Roslyn MCP tools for C#/.NET repository overview, find usages, find references, go to definition, implementations, diagnostics, compile errors, test impact, context packing, rename, and safe refactor previews.
defaultPrompt: For C#/.NET tasks, use Roslyn MCP tools before broad grep: find usages, find references, go to definition, implementations, diagnostics, compile errors, test impact, rename, and refactor planning.
Start with cs_repo_overview, keep results compact, and request source only when an edit requires exact code.
